declarations.name: AccountDropdown
declarations.description: AccountDropdown component.

declarations.name: AlertBanner
declarations.description: Static, high-visibility message placed at the top of a page or section. Use for persistent system-level information (Success, Info, Warning, Error) that doesn't disappear automatically.

declarations.name: AppSwitcherDropdown
declarations.description:
Menu: -4 Density 
Menus display a list of choices on a temporary surface. They appear when users interact with a button, action, or other control.

🛠 Additional options 
Menu list item - can be edited by selecting individual list item and  selecting wether it is enabled, selected, and has a divider from the variant properties.

declarations.name: Badge
declarations.description: Small status or numerical indicator (e.g., "Active", "New", "+5"). Use for counts or short, non-interactive status labels.

declarations.name: Breadcrumb
declarations.description: Use to show the user's current location within a hierarchical multi-level structure. Enables 1-click navigation back to parent pages.

declarations.name: ZenButton
declarations.description: Actian Product Design System Button. Taxonomy is Intent x Emphasis: Intent adds Critical; Emphasis is Filled, Outlined, or Ghost.

attributes.name: intent
attributes.description: Semantic intent. Critical marks a destructive action.

attributes.name: emphasis
attributes.description: Visual emphasis. Filled is the primary treatment, Outlined the secondary, Ghost the least prominent.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Control height. Small is the compact density.

cssParts.name: icon
cssParts.description: A leading or trailing icon wrapper.

declarations.name: Calendar
declarations.description: Calendar component.

type.text: Single date select | Date | Month | Single

declarations.name: CardForItems
declarations.description: A flexible container for grouping related information. Use for dashboard summaries or items in a grid that require an overview.

type.text: Catalog | Item | item type | Glossary type | Topic

declarations.name: ChatWithAiSteward
declarations.description: ChatWithAiSteward component.

declarations.name: Checkbox
declarations.description: Used for binary choices (on/off) or when a user can select multiple options from a list of related items.

declarations.name: DropdownSelectDefault
declarations.description: Use when there are more than 7 options or space is limited. Ideal for selecting one item from a pre-defined list (e.g., Country, State).

type.text: Default | Hover | Focus | Active | Filled | Disabled

declarations.name: EmptyState
declarations.description: A placeholder shown when a container has no content (e.g., empty search, no messages). Must include an illustration, a clear title, and a "Call to Action" button to help the user get started.

declarations.name: GlobalHeader
declarations.description: The persistent top-level container for branding, primary site-wide navigation, and user-specific actions (e.g., Profile, Logout).

declarations.name: InputDate
declarations.description: Used for selecting a single date, a date range, or a specific point in time. Best for scheduling or historical data entry.

type.text: Enabled | Hovered | Focused | Error | Disabled | Fille | Activ

declarations.name: Loader
declarations.description: Indicates a background process is active. Use loader for large components or large section within a page

declarations.name: Modal
declarations.description: A centered dialog that blocks the main content. Use for critical "Stop and Think" actions, confirmations, or complex data entry that must be completed or cancelled before moving on.

type.text: 700px setting | 1200px | 900px create | 900px edit | 700px create | 450px warning | 450px confirm

declarations.name: Notification
declarations.description: Small, temporary overlay that appears at the edge of the screen. Use for non-critical confirmations (e.g., "Item saved"). Automatically dismisses after 3–5 seconds.

declarations.name: PageHeader
declarations.description: The title area of a specific page. Should include the Page Title, optional Breadcrumbs, and page-specific primary actions.

type.text: Default | Details page | Explorer home | Explorer detail

declarations.name: Popover
declarations.description: A non-modal floating container triggered by a click. Use for displaying a small menu or related content that doesn't fit in a tooltip. Stays open until a user clicks outside.

declarations.name: ProgressBarSmall
declarations.description: Visualizes the completion percentage of a task.  Use as a static visualization like a bar graph to show the completeness.

declarations.name: RadioButton
declarations.description: Used for mutually exclusive choices where the user must select exactly one option from a short list (2–7 items).

declarations.name: RichText
declarations.description: A multi-line input field that allows for text formatting (bold, links, lists). Use for long-form content like descriptions or comments.

declarations.name: Search
declarations.description: A specialized text input designed to query a database or filter a page's content in real-time.

type.text: Hovered | Focused | Filled | Active | Dsiabled | Default

declarations.name: SegmentedControl
declarations.description: Use for mutually exclusive options that impact the immediate view. Best for 2–4 options (e.g., "Week / Month / Year").

declarations.name: SideNav
declarations.description: Vertical navigation for primary application modules. Use when the app has many top-level sections or needs to show sub-navigation.

declarations.name: Stepper
declarations.description: Use to guide a user through a linear process with defined steps (e.g., Onboarding). Indicates current, completed, and upcoming steps.

declarations.name: StickyFooter
declarations.description: A persistent container at the bottom of the viewport used for high-priority global actions (e.g., Save, Cancel, Next) that must remain visible while scrolling.

declarations.name: Table
declarations.description:
Use for large datasets requiring comparison, sorting, and filtering. Supports complex rows with multi-type data (text, badges, actions).

"If data is null, display the 'Empty State' illustration variant with a 'Create New' call to action."

declarations.name: Tabs
declarations.description: Use to switch between related views within the same context without navigating to a new page. Ideal for organizing content at the same level.

declarations.name: TagDefault
declarations.description: Use for categorizing or labeling items (e.g., "Design", "In Progress"). Can be interactive (removable) or static metadata.

type.text: Pink | Purple | Indigo | Yellow | Lime | Teal | Orange | Gray | Default

declarations.name: TagInteractive
declarations.description: TagInteractive component.

type.text: Hovered | Pressed | Selected | Disabled | Focused | Default

declarations.name: TextInput
declarations.description: Used for single-line alphanumeric data entry (e.g., Name, Email, Phone). Specify the "type" attribute if applicable.

type.text: Default | Hover | Focus | Active | Filled | Error | Warning | Disabled | Read-only

declarations.name: Toggle
declarations.description: Used for an immediate "on/off" state change that doesn't require a "Submit" button to take effect (e.g., System Settings).

declarations.name: Toolbar
declarations.description: Toolbar component.

declarations.name: Tooltip
declarations.description: Flex width with maximum width of 320px.
